modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error when trying to create new E-PAF in SNAP.

full_description_text: 
I can't create a new E-PAF in SNAP. When I click the Create New PAF button, I get an error. It says the page is not enabled for my user role. I restarted my computer, but the same error shows up again.
short_description: Error when trying to create new E-PAF in SNAP.
description: I can't create a new E-PAF in SNAP. When I click the Create New PAF button, I get an error. It says the page is not enabled for my user role. I restarted my computer, but the same error shows up again.
